what: extractor-blocked-needs-human label — the human-triage signal added when the automation can't proceed and hands the issue to a person: the prepare workflow's download-failure path (auto-implement-extractor.yml), the agent's bail path (agent-prompt-extractor.md), the probe's reason text (probe-url.js), and the finalize anomaly hand-off (phase2-finalize.sh). Created idempotently before use. Counts include comments.
